New to BaT? Learn how it works.

Porsche 911 GT3

Originally created as a homologation special to race in the FIA GT3 cup series, the 911 GT3 has become a quintessential track weapon for anyone who wants a 911 to be able to drive to the track, enjoy while there, and be able to drive home afterward.

Notify me when one is listed You're subscribed to new listing alerts You're Subscribed Have one? Sell yours here
Porsche > Porsche 911 GT3

Porsche Models (4)

Hit the bell icon   to subscribe to alerts for that model.

Porsche 911 GT3 Live Auctions (7)

4.0L Porsche 997 GT3 Flat-Six Engine Project

USA
This collection of parts includes a 997 Porsche flat-six engine case that has been machined with a 105.4 mm bore and 76.4 mm stroke to displace 4.0 liters, along with a crankshaft, camshafts, pistons, and cylinder heads. The collection also includes an oil pump, timing chains, chain guides, connecting rods, a standard and fluid-damper front…
Bid: USD $4,444

Porsche 911 GT3 RS Wooden Display Model

USA
NR No Reserve
This model of a Porsche 911 GT3 RS is said to have been created by Olivier De Schrijver and features a sculpted body and interior constructed from wood. The build rolls on a pair of steel axles, and further highlights include a swan-neck rear wing, opening doors, faux front, rear, and side scoops, a detailed interior, and an acrylic windshield and…
Bid: USD $2,000

Blue Turquoise 2022 Porsche 911 GT3 Touring 6-Speed

USA
This 2022 Porsche 911 GT3 Touring was optioned with a six-speed manual transaxle and a paint-to-sample Blue Turquoise exterior finish, and its heated 18-way adaptive Sport Plus seats are trimmed in Cognac Brown leather with Houndstooth-style cloth inserts. Powered by a 4.0-liter flat-six, the car has 6k miles and is further equipped with the…
Bid: USD $280,000

Slate Gray 2022 Porsche 911 GT3 6-Speed

USA
This 2022 Porsche 911 GT3 was ordered through the Sonderwunsch Factory Commissioning program with approximately $121k in options, some of which include a paint-to-sample Slate Gray exterior finish in addition to an individualized interior that houses carbon-fiber full bucket seats trimmed in Bordeaux Red leather with black Race-Tex inserts.
Bid: USD $210,000

Euro Porsche 996 GT3 Recaro Seats

USA
NR No Reserve
These bucket seats were manufactured by Recaro for use in 996-generation Porsche 911 models and are upholstered in black leather over color-coordinated fiberglass shells. The fixed-back design incorporates harness pass-throughs, and Porsche crests are debossed on the headrests. The seats were installed in a 1995 Porsche 911 Carrera that the seller…
Bid: USD $2,096

Oak Metallic Neo 2026 Porsche 911 GT3 Touring 6-Speed

USA
This 2026 Porsche 911 GT3 Touring was ordered with $53k in options, some of which include Porsche Ceramic Composite Brakes with yellow-finished calipers as well as an Exclusive Manufaktur Leather Interior, which houses heated 18-way adaptive Sport Plus front seats trimmed in Magnesium Gray leather. Powered by a 4.0-liter flat-six mated to…
Bid: USD $250,000

Fish Silvergray Metallic 2023 Porsche 911 GT3 Touring 6-Speed

USA
This 2023 Porsche 911 GT3 Touring has 3,500 miles and was optioned with a paint-to-sample Fish Silvergray Metallic exterior finish in addition to a six-speed manual transaxle and a $15k Exclusive Manufaktur Leather Interior that houses heated 18-way adaptive Sport Plus seats trimmed in gray leather. Braking is through Porsche Ceramic Composite…
Bid: USD $228,911
